note: Framework maturity assessed against CMMI-style L1-L4 scale. Updated from May 7 baseline. Source: CHANGELOG.md, RULES.md, MEMORY.md, PG state_frameworks document inventory. CREST v1.2 locked Jun 10 (CHG-0481) advances agile maturity.

frameworks.name: AGILE
frameworks.label: Managed
frameworks.evidence: CREST locked v1.2 (CHG-0481). Sprint cadence established. Retro/fwd-plan in sprint-review.sh. TQP processor live. 2-pass dispatch contract ratified. Sprint 7 complete, Sprint 8 in planning.

frameworks.name: ITSM
frameworks.label: Defined
frameworks.evidence: ticket.sh fully operational. PG-backed. Notion sync. Auto-heal → INC logging. Incident management pattern established. Fold SOP locked (CHG-0456).

frameworks.name: GOVERNANCE
frameworks.label: Defined
frameworks.evidence: Shield/Lex/Sage triad nightly. Warden 15-min model compliance. Skill audit gate. Content governance gate. AI Charter + Governance Framework v1.0 approved. Not yet battle-tested with client data.

frameworks.name: TOM
frameworks.label: Developing
frameworks.note: Angie onboarding Stage 2 (Notion command centre) directly advances TOM L2→L3. Business stream blocked on Angie availability.

frameworks.name: MODEL STRATEGY
frameworks.label: Defined / Managed
frameworks.evidence: 4-tier model strategy locked. Ollama Cloud PoC complete. OC2 local inference planned. Model3-Policy active. Fallback chains verified. Monthly review cadence. Cost tracking live.

frameworks.name: KNOWLEDGE MGMT
frameworks.label: Developing
frameworks.evidence: MEMORY.md + daily notes + journal pattern established. PG SSOT live. Holocron (Notion) active. Semantic memory (P1) deferred post-OC2. MEMORY.md archiving manual.

frameworks.name: COST MANAGEMENT
frameworks.label: Defined
frameworks.evidence: cost-tracker.sh live. Daily budget reports. Ollama Cloud $100/mo fixed. PG state_cost SSOT. Midday cost tracker. Per-agent budget alerts. Missing: automated optimization recommendations.

frameworks.name: BUSINESS ROI
frameworks.label: Developing
frameworks.note: Aria weekly business ROI summaries active. Business value tracked via business-roi.json. Linked to cost data. Missing: client-facing reporting, automated value attribution.
